title: Neural Machine Translation by Jointly Learning to Align and Translate

claims.text: A soft-search attention mechanism allows the model to align and translate jointly, alleviating the fixed-length context bottleneck.
claims.source_text: We conjecture that the use of a fixed-length vector is a bottleneck in improving the performance of this basic encoder–decoder architecture

methods.name: Soft Attention Alignment
methods.source_text: the model soft-searches for a set of positions in a source sentence
